graceful_oversized.golden_bad_reason: no HTTP response (connection dropped -- possible crash under load)

probes.description: Auth-boundary: unauth vs bogus-auth-header request behavior + bind-address check
probes.detail: unauth request status=200, bogus-auth-header request status=200 (both succeed identically => NO auth boundary enforced at this layer); listen socket bound_to_all_interfaces=True

probes.description: Malformed/invalid JSON body rejection (server returns 4xx, does not crash)
probes.detail: cases=[('truncated-json', False, 'server error 500 (possible crash/unhandled exception)'), ('invalid-json-syntax', False, 'server error 500 (possible crash/unhandled exception)'), ('wrong-type-messages', True, 'correctly rejected with 400')]; server_alive_after=True

probes.description: Injection payload safe-handling (path traversal, null bytes, control chars, SQLi-like, prompt-injection, deep nesting)
probes.detail: path-traversal-model=OK; null-byte-content=OK; control-chars-content=OK; sql-like-content=OK; prompt-injection-system-override=OK; oversized-array-nesting=OK

probes.description: Secret-leak scan (no env vars/keys/tokens echoed in normal or error responses)
probes.detail: direct-exfil-attempt: no secret markers found in response body; invalid-model-error-path: no secret markers found in response body

probes.description: Oversized payload (~2MB prompt) handled gracefully, server remains alive
probes.detail: handled with status 400 in 0.38s (no crash); payload_size_mb=1.93; server_alive_after=True
